title: Just Crowns
description: This is just the crowns from my Trimmable Minimal Armour Pack.
body:
Need a server for you and your friends? click the image below:

# Just Trimmable Crowns
This is a pack which only changes the helmets to the crowns from [Trimmable Minimal Armour](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minimal-armour-trimmable). Made for this person. and if it does well then I will add modded support from [Trimmable Minimal Armour](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minimal-armour-trimmable).

![YouTube Comment of @I-filled-in-this-space saying Hello just wondering if you could make a 26.1 version of this pack that only has the crowns and the rest of the armour is the same (also great job on the pack its awesome)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3400218c4879773d4e9938d6714b0bd760ffb4c0.png)

## All Armours

![A Screenshot of all the vanilla armours with the crown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2abfb26ba57612e83f215406c986b827449a47ba.png)
